---
ID: US-CMP-FE-1202
Title: Overview tab next-actions and activity prioritization
Status: Not Started
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-FE-1202
Epic: CMP-PAR-E1: Workspace IA and Context Integrity
---

As a campaign manager
I want an overview tab that prioritizes next actions and recent activity
So I can quickly decide what needs attention first

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Overview tab includes campaign snapshot cards with status, owner, date range, channels, and lifecycle counts.
- [ ] Next Actions panel ranks urgent work first (review items, approved-unscheduled, overdue reminders, blocked items, missing metadata).
- [ ] Each next-action item deep-links to the relevant filtered workspace view or content item.
- [ ] Recent activity feed is scannable, time-ordered, and clearly distinguishes user actions from system events.
- [ ] Empty overview states explicitly communicate when campaign operations are up to date.
- [ ] Overview is available at a stable route and passes mobile readability checks.
